_patch_meta.description: Reset 75 terse set-asides (all H2896A tov, reasons 'physical_only' or 'no_inner_being') so they re-enter the pipeline at Pass A for fresh per-verse reading. Researcher direction 2026-05-18: verses were bulk-processed under bias; require individual reading under v2_5 §1.1 full inner-being scope. After this patch + Pass A run, each verse will have a fresh authored meaning. Researcher then dispositions each (PROMOTE-TO-SUBGROUP / CONFIRM-SET-ASIDE-with-§4.5.1-reason / HOLD).

set.notes: [audit-fix v2_5 RESCUE-reset 2026-05-18] Original set_aside_reason='no_inner_being' was terse and possibly bulk-processed under bias. Reset for fresh individual Pass A reading under v2_5 §1.1 scope. Disposition (PROMOTE / SET-ASIDE-with-proper-reason / HOLD) to be decided per-verse after Pass A meaning is authored.
